subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.8
question_html:
Which of these statements are correct?

I. Zinc is not a transition element.
II. Ligands are Lewis bases.
III. Manganese(II) chloride is paramagnetic.

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
examiners_html: This was one of only two questions where less than 50% of candidates got the correct answer. Many either didn't understand manganese chloride as paramagnetic or classified zinc as a transition element.
